purpose: Aggregate the artifact-governance A1-A5, A7, and A8 deliverables into one checked signoff lane with explicit proof manifest, proof-status, runbook, closeout, and no-claim boundaries.

signoff_policy.non_destructive_policy: This signoff records governance closeout metadata only. It does not delete files, clean generated output, create branches, create worktrees, or authorize local Cargo fallback for remote-required proof lanes.
signoff_policy.tracker_policy: If .beads/issues.jsonl is dirty with unrelated work, record code and proof closeout in Agent Mail and defer tracker close until a clean tracker write is safe.

child_deliverables.name: ledger schema, citeability taxonomy, and exclusion policy
corpus scanner for ownership, checks, and citation references
citation policy checks and no-claim boundary enforcement
operator report for orphan, stale, superseded, and citeable artifacts
producer checklist and CI guard for new durable artifacts
seed backfill across high-value artifact families
unit, fixture, and e2e validation harness with structured logs

proof_lane.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_artifact_governance_final_signoff CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test artifact_governance_final_signoff_contract --test artifact_governance_validation_harness_contract --test artifact_governance_ledger_contract --test proof_lane_manifest_contract --test proof_status_snapshot_contract -- --nocapture
proof_lane.expected_signal: artifact_governance_final_signoff_contract plus governance and proof manifest/status contracts pass

operator_closeout_checklist.action: Run the exact proof_lane.command through remote-required RCH.
operator_closeout_checklist.fail_closed_if: RCH admission is unavailable, falls back local, or returns stale progress without terminal test output.

operator_closeout_checklist.action: Confirm proof_lane_manifest, proof_status_snapshot, README, and AGENTS markers stay aligned.
operator_closeout_checklist.fail_closed_if: The lane command, guarantee id, status claim, or docs markers drift.

operator_closeout_checklist.action: Confirm the final signoff row exists in the artifact-governance ledger and carries no local fallback and no release-readiness boundaries.
operator_closeout_checklist.fail_closed_if: The ledger row is missing, untested, or overclaims broad workspace health.

operator_closeout_checklist.action: Close A4, A7, A8, and A6 in Beads only when .beads/issues.jsonl is clean enough for a bounded tracker write.
operator_closeout_checklist.fail_closed_if: Tracker state contains unrelated dirty comments or another agent is actively writing tracker rows.
